required_sections.name: Page Thesis
required_sections.purpose: State the governed thesis of the reference unit
required_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: One clear thesis tied to category system purpose
required_sections.prohibited_content: tool implication, keyword stuffing, unsupported superiority

required_sections.name: Definition and Scope
required_sections.purpose: Define concept and state coverage boundaries
required_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Bounded definition with explicit inclusions and exclusions

required_sections.name: Governance Boundary
required_sections.purpose: State what the page must not be read to claim

required_sections.name: Relationship to Hoax.ai System
required_sections.purpose: Connect page to governed taxonomy, standard, protocol, or governance layers
required_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: At least one system relationship documented

required_sections.name: Semantic SEO Role
required_sections.purpose: Explain how title, description, headings clarify governed concept
required_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: SEO metadata aligned with thesis and claim scope
required_sections.prohibited_content: keyword stuffing, tool-implying titles, clickbait metadata, fake/real detector keywords

required_sections.name: Prohibited Misreadings
required_sections.purpose: List misreadings the page must prevent
required_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Explicit prohibited misreadings including truth machine and detector framing
required_sections.prohibited_content: scoring language, subject accusation, upload implication

required_sections.name: Claim and Source Traceability
required_sections.purpose: Map material claims to ledger, claim-source map, and source registry
required_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Traceability table or explicit claim-source mapping

required_sections.name: Internal Links
required_sections.purpose: Document required internal links to eligible registered routes
required_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Link plan to existing eligible routes only
required_sections.prohibited_content: links to planned or blocked routes

required_sections.name: Last Reviewed
required_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Review date or status metadata present

conditional_sections.name: Taxonomy Relationship
conditional_sections.purpose: Link to evidence posture taxonomy dimensions or states
conditional_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Explicit taxonomy dimension or state mapping
conditional_sections.notes: Conditional when page explains taxonomy element.

conditional_sections.name: Standard Relationship
conditional_sections.purpose: Link to evidence posture standard elements

conditional_sections.name: Output Boundary Relationship
conditional_sections.purpose: Link to output boundary schema fields or language
conditional_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Schema field or language contract mapping

conditional_sections.name: Source Scope Notes
conditional_sections.purpose: Document source support scope and limits
conditional_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Registered source references with support scope

conditional_sections.name: Related Reference Concepts
conditional_sections.purpose: Link to related governed reference concepts
conditional_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Internal links to eligible concepts or routes

conditional_sections.name: Publisher Candidate Notes
conditional_sections.purpose: Document candidate ID, page family, and publisher workflow state
conditional_sections.minimum_substance_requirement: Candidate registry alignment and blocked publisher status acknowledgment
conditional_sections.prohibited_content: direct publish instructions, draft generation without harness
